mapper.select: select id, name, code, city, province, is_hot from station;

select * from station
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
order by created_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into station (name, code, address, city, province, longitude, latitude, status, is_hot, description, phone, created_time, created_by, updated_time, updated_by) values (#{name}, #{code}, #{address}, #{city}, #{province}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{status}, #{isHot}, #{description}, #{phone}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{updateBy})
mapper.update: update station set name = #{name}, code = #{code}, address = #{address}, city = #{city}, province = #{province}, longitude = #{longitude}, latitude = #{latitude}, status = #{status}, is_hot = #{isHot}, description = #{description}, phone = #{phone}, updated_time = now(), updated_by = #{updateBy} where id = #{id}
